_meta.name: ALM 70B FSDP config — accelerate FSDP full-shard spec for Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct
_meta.emitted_by: training/launch_alm_70b.hexa (writes this as YAML to /workspace/alm_70b_fsdp_config.yaml at launch time)
_meta.purpose: JSON SSOT for FSDP recipe — launcher reads this at runtime and emits the YAML. Keeping JSON here (not YAML) matches the shared/ JSON convention and allows other tools (preflight, eval, r2_sync) to parse the same fields.

fsdp_config.fsdp_sharding_strategy_rationale: Zero-3 full shard — base weights + grads + optimizer state all sharded across 4 ranks. 72B bf16 (145GB) / 4 = 36.4 GB/rank + activations 22 + lora 2.5 + cuda 3 = 64 GB/rank on 80GB SXM (16 GB headroom).
fsdp_config.fsdp_offload_params_rationale: 80GB × 4 = 320GB aggregate is sufficient for 145GB weights + activations without CPU offload. Offload would add 30-60% training time penalty due to PCIe 5.0 @ 64 GB/s vs HBM3 3 TB/s.
fsdp_config.fsdp_auto_wrap_policy_rationale: Wrap each of Qwen2.5-72B's 80 decoder layers as an FSDP unit. LoRA adapters (r=32) inside each wrapped layer shard with the frozen base linears they attach to, preserving gradient flow via fsdp_use_orig_params=true.
fsdp_config.fsdp_backward_prefetch_rationale: Overlap all-gather with backward compute. BACKWARD_PRE prefetches next layer's params during current layer's backward pass — hides NCCL latency at cost of small activation memory spike. Alternative BACKWARD_POST is safer on memory but slower; we have 16GB headroom so BACKWARD_PRE is safe.
fsdp_config.fsdp_forward_prefetch_rationale: Per HF/accelerate recs: forward prefetch can cause activation spike during wrap transitions. Keep off for 72B first-run; can enable if measured headroom > 30GB at step 100.
fsdp_config.fsdp_state_dict_type_rationale: Save rank-per-shard adapter files during training (fast save, no cross-rank gather). For final ckpt + intermediate eval: call accelerate.utils.merge_fsdp_weights to produce single adapter_model.bin. Per spec blockers.R5_CHECKPOINT_FRAGILITY, first ckpt at step 100 MUST be merged + load-tested on single-GPU inference pod before trusting the recipe.
fsdp_config.fsdp_cpu_ram_efficient_loading_rationale: On load, rank 0 loads full state dict to CPU RAM, then broadcasts shards to other ranks as they attach to GPU. Requires 256GB+ host RAM. Alternative: each rank loads from disk separately (slower, uses 4× disk bandwidth).
fsdp_config.fsdp_sync_module_states_rationale: Mandatory at init to ensure all ranks start from identical weights. Omitting this is a known silent-corruption cause (rank drift).
fsdp_config.fsdp_use_orig_params_rationale: REQUIRED FOR peft/LoRA. Without it, peft cannot identify adapter params for selective optimizer updates (LoraConfig filters trainable=True params, but FSDP flattens them into single _FlatParameter by default). use_orig_params=true keeps each adapter linear as a separate parameter object, preserving peft's filter.
fsdp_config.fsdp_limit_all_gathers_rationale: Rate-limit concurrent all-gather operations to prevent NCCL memory explosion. Recommended by PyTorch FSDP team for Zero-3 at >= 4 ranks. Cost: ~2-5% throughput; benefit: prevents rank 0 OOM under all-gather pile-up at step 1.
fsdp_config.fsdp_activation_checkpointing_rationale: Grad checkpoint every layer (or every N=8 via custom wrap). At 72B seq=1024 batch=1 per rank, activations without checkpointing = ~50 GB/rank — over 80GB budget. With checkpointing every 8 layers, activations = ~22 GB/rank (fits). Throughput cost ~25% — accepted.

memory_math_verification.per_gpu_activations_calc: seq=1024 × batch=1 × 80 layers × ~275 MB/layer (Qwen2.5-72B hidden=8192 MLP=29568 grad_ckpt_every_8) = 22 GB
memory_math_verification.per_gpu_lora_state_calc: LoRA r=32 on 7 modules × 80 layers ≈ 417M params. Adapter 0.83GB + grad 0.83GB + AdamW states (fp32) 3.3GB = 4.96GB sharded × 1/4 replica = 1.24GB; scale by 2 for safety = ~2.5 GB
memory_math_verification.per_gpu_cuda_overhead_calc: CUDA context + NCCL buffers + kernel workspace ≈ 3 GB empirical from r8a pod
memory_math_verification.per_gpu_headroom_rationale: 16GB headroom allows (a) seq_len expansion to 1536 if desired, (b) grad_checkpoint relaxation (every 12 vs every 8) for ~15% throughput gain, (c) safety margin for NCCL pile-up + BACKWARD_PRE spike.
memory_math_verification.fits_on_80gb_sxm_4gpu_verdict: CONFIRMED VIABLE — 64 GB / 80 GB per rank (80% utilization, 20% headroom)

nccl_config.NCCL_DEBUG_rationale: Verbose logs for first-run debugging. Downgrade to WARN after step 100 smoke pass.
nccl_config.NCCL_IB_DISABLE_rationale: Enable InfiniBand if pod has it (RunPod SXM5 single-node uses NVLink intra-node so IB is unused anyway). Setting 0 explicitly prevents NCCL from falling back to slower paths.
nccl_config.NCCL_P2P_LEVEL_rationale: Force NVLink for peer-to-peer — critical for 4xSXM5 single-node topology. 900 GB/s NVLink vs 64 GB/s PCIe.
nccl_config.NCCL_TIMEOUT_rationale: 30min timeout. FSDP first backward pass on 72B can take ~2-5 min per step; default 10-min timeout is too aggressive.

torchrun_env.PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF_rationale: Reduces memory fragmentation at FSDP boundary transitions. Default caching allocator fragments on 4-rank all-gather/reduce-scatter cycles; expandable_segments keeps free blocks contiguous.
torchrun_env.TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM_rationale: HF tokenizers parallel path conflicts with torchrun multiprocess — silently deadlocks. Must be false for FSDP.
torchrun_env.OMP_NUM_THREADS_rationale: 4 ranks × 8 threads = 32 OMP threads on 128-core pod. Prevents CPU oversubscription at data-loading step.

save_during_training.size_per_ckpt_note: 4 rank shards × ~1 GB adapter weights + optimizer fp32 state = ~4 GB

merge_for_inference.load_test: Must load-test merged adapter on single-GPU inference pod — if load fails or hire_sim diverges >2% from rank0 eval, HALT 72B run (recipe broken per spec.blockers.R5)

final_upload_to_r2.upload_trigger: POST-training only (per training/CLAUDE.md runpod_mfs_quota rule — NO in-training R2 uploads)

gate_criteria_40_of_40.description: Preflight + FSDP smoke must pass 40 individual checks before training launch. See training/alm_70b_preflight.hexa for full list.
gate_criteria_40_of_40.pass_threshold_note: ALL 40 must PASS. Any WARN elevated to FAIL under STRICT=1 (launch-time strict mode).
